description:
In ProxyController.proxy_image_fetch, when following redirects, the code creates a new HTTP::Client for the redirect URL but doesn't validate that the redirect URL is still on an allowed domain. If the original URL redirects to a disallowed domain, the request will still proceed.

The reject_private_host? check only applies to the initial URL in fetch_and_save, not to redirect URLs.

Location: src/controllers/proxy_controller.cr
title: Bug: ProxyController image fetch has redirect URL validation gap
